mapper.select:
SELECT p.expression FROM sys_permission p LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ur.user_id
AND u.id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0

SELECT sr.id, sr.name FROM sys_role sr LEFT JOIN sys_user_role sur ON sr.id = sur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON su.id = sur.user_id
AND su.id = #{id} AND su.is_deleted = 0
